form.profileIconDescription: Enter a Gyazo page URL to update your profile icon. Leave blank to keep your current icon.

safeSearch.label: Safe Search
safeSearch.description: Exclude R-18 content from search results.

ageVerification.title: Age Verification
ageVerification.description:
Turning off safe search may show R-18 content.
Are you 18 or older?

confirm.title: Are you sure?
confirm.description: This action cannot be undone. Your account information will be anonymized and you will no longer be able to log in.
